back: to pass through, to go along
to rest, to take a day off
to wake up, to get up
to contact, to get in touch
to clean up, to put away
to line up, to stand in line
to become empty, to be free
to be left over, to remain
to fail, to make a mistake
to be related to, to concern
to use, to make use of
to be available, to be usable
to be careful, to watch out
to be troubled, to have a problem
to be saved, to be helped
to be lost, to be undecided
to be audible, to be heard
to fit, to match, to suit
to be important, to be precious
to be okay, to be fine
to be strange, to be odd
from now on, in the future
for a while, for some time
